parameters.notes: Single coherent expert pancake segment from batter pour through syrup finish.

operations.reason: Use the cleanest recipe-like stretch of the chef segment and avoid bloopers, banter, and end-card material.

parameters.notes: True portrait reframe centered on the pan, pancake, hands, spatula, and plated result.

operations.reason: Convert the landscape source into a real 9:16 vertical frame while keeping the cooking action visible.
Make the method readable as a step-by-step social tutorial.

parameters.notes: Preserved original cooking/speech audio and normalized loudness without adding music.

operations.reason: Keep useful source audio audible and avoid clipping or silent padding.

checks_performed: ffprobe submit/output.mp4 confirmed H.264 video, AAC audio, 720x1280, 9:16 SAR 1:1, 62.0 s duration
Sampled 1 fps output frames and reviewed a contact sheet to confirm the pan, flipping, and plated finish remain visible
ffmpeg volumedetect reported mean_volume -19.7 dB and max_volume -1.3 dB, indicating no clipping
ffmpeg silencedetect found no silence segments in the final output
Python frame analysis on 62 sampled frames found no dark frames below luma 15 and no near-frozen sequence (min sampled frame diff 3.36)
